_comment: constellation archinstall answer file. Seeds a node base; the firstboot hook then clones the constellation repo and runs the ansible playbook to converge to the full wintermute set. Edit disk/hostname per node, or pass --config to archinstall interactively.

disk_config._comment: Override per node. Default: best-effort guided wipe of /dev/sda. Use archinstall --config + --disk_layouts for production.
